member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating a distributed application for testing.
member.param: A type in the entry point assembly of the target Aspire AppHost. Typically, the Program class can be used.
The command-line arguments to pass to the entry point.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.#ctor(System.Type,System.String[])
member.summary: Factory for creating a distributed application for testing.
member.param: A type in the entry point assembly of the target Aspire AppHost. Typically, the Program class can be used.
The command-line arguments to pass to the entry point.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A type in the entry point assembly of the target Aspire AppHost. Typically, the Program class can be used.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.ResolveBuilderAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the distributed application associated with this instance.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.ResolveApplicationAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the distributed application associated with this instance.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the application.
member.param: A token used to signal cancellation.
member.returns: A representing the completion of the operation.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.CreateHttpClient(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an instance of that is configured to route requests to the specified resource and endpoint.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.GetConnectionString(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the connection string for the specified resource.
member.param: The resource name.
member.returns: The connection string for the specified resource.
member.exception: The resource was not found or does not expose a connection string.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.GetEndpoint(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the endpoint for the specified resource.
member.param: The resource name.
The optional endpoint name. If none are specified, the single defined endpoint is returned.
member.returns: A URI representation of the endpoint.
member.exception: The resource was not found, no matching endpoint was found, or multiple endpoints were found.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.OnBuilderCreating(Aspire.Hosting.DistributedApplicationOptions,Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HostApplicationBuilderSettings)
member.summary: Called when the application builder is being created.
member.param: The application options.
The host builder options.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.OnBuilderCreated(Aspire.Hosting.DistributedApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Called when the application builder is created.
member.param: The application builder.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.OnBuilding(Aspire.Hosting.DistributedApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Called when the application is being built.
member.param: The application builder.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationFactory.OnBuilt(Aspire.Hosting.DistributedApplication)
member.summary: Called when the application has been built.
member.param: The application.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationHostingTestingExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for working with in test code.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationHostingTestingExtensions.CreateHttpClient(Aspire.Hosting.DistributedApplication,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an configured to communicate with the specified resource.
member.param: The application.
The resourceName of the resource.
The resourceName of the endpoint on the resource to communicate with.
member.remarks: This method is not available in polyglot app hosts.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationHostingTestingExtensions.GetConnectionStringAsync(Aspire.Hosting.DistributedApplication,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the connection string for the specified resource.
member.param: The application.
The resource name.
A .
member.remarks: This overload is not available in polyglot app hosts. Use the exported overload without a cancellation token instead.
member.returns: The connection string for the specified resource.
member.exception: The resource was not found or does not expose a connection string.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationHostingTestingExtensions.GetConnectionStringAsyncExport(Aspire.Hosting.DistributedApplication,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the connection string for the specified resource.
member.param: The application.
The resource name.
member.returns: The connection string for the specified resource.
member.exception: The resource was not found or does not expose a connection string.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationHostingTestingExtensions.GetEndpoint(Aspire.Hosting.DistributedApplication,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the endpoint for the specified resource.
member.param: The application.
The resource name.
The optional endpoint name. If none are specified, the single defined endpoint is returned.
member.returns: A URI representation of the endpoint.
member.exception: The resource was not found, no matching endpoint was found, or multiple endpoints were found.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationHostingTestingExtensions.GetEndpointForNetwork(Aspire.Hosting.DistributedApplication,System.String,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.NetworkIdentifier,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the endpoint for the specified resource.
member.param: The application.
The resource name.
The optional network identifier. If none is specified, the default network is used.
The optional endpoint name. If none are specified, the single defined endpoint is returned.
member.remarks: This overload is not available in polyglot app hosts. Use the exported overload that accepts a network identifier string instead.
member.returns: A URI representation of the endpoint.
member.exception: The resource was not found, no matching endpoint was found, or multiple endpoints were found.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.DistributedApplicationHostingTestingExtensions.GetEndpointForNetworkExport(Aspire.Hosting.DistributedApplication,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the endpoint for the specified resource in the specified network context.
member.param: The application.
The resource name.
The optional network identifier string. If none is specified, the default network is used.
The optional endpoint name. If none are specified, the single defined endpoint is returned.
member.returns: A URI representation of the endpoint.
member.exception: The resource was not found, no matching endpoint was found, or multiple endpoints were found.

member.summary: Methods for creating distributed application instances for testing purposes.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.IDistributedApplicationTestingBuilder
member.summary: A builder for creating instances of for testing purposes.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.IDistributedApplicationTestingBuilder.BuildAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Builds and returns a new instance. This can only be called once.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.Properties.Resources.ApplicationNotStartedExceptionMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The application must be started before resolving endpoints or connection strings..

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.Properties.Resources.EndpointForResourceNotFoundExceptionMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Endpoint '{0}' for resource '{1}' not found..

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.Properties.Resources.ResourceDoesNotExposeConnectionStringExceptionMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Resource '{0}' does not expose a connection string..

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.Properties.Resources.ResourceHasNoAllocatedEndpointsExceptionMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Resource '{0}' has no allocated endpoints..

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Testing.Properties.Resources.ResourceNotFoundExceptionMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Resource '{0}' not found..

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.LaunchSettingsReader.GetLaunchSettingsFromDirectory(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reads launch settings from the Properties/launchSettings.json file within the specified directory.
member.param: The directory to look for launch settings in. If , a relative path is used.
A descriptive identifier used in error messages when JSON parsing fails.
member.returns: The deserialized , or if the file does not exist.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.LaunchSettingsReader.ReadLaunchSettingsFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reads and deserializes launch settings from the specified file.
member.param: The path to the launch settings file.
A descriptive identifier used in error messages when JSON parsing fails.
member.exception: Thrown when the file is empty or contains malformed JSON.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.LaunchSettingsSerializerContext.Boolean
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.LaunchSettingsSerializerContext.NullableBoolean
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.LaunchSettingsSerializerContext.LaunchSettings
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.LaunchSettingsSerializerContext.DictionaryStringLaunchProfile
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.LaunchSettingsSerializerContext.DictionaryStringString
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.LaunchSettingsSerializerContext.String
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.LaunchSettingsSerializerContext.Default
member.summary: The default associated with a default instance.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.LaunchSettingsSerializerContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.
